sentences.text: That road is long.
My hair is long.
He wrote a long letter.
In spring, many flowers grow.
The weather is warm in spring.
I will go to the mountains in spring.
The sky is blue today.
There are many clouds in the sky.
At night there are stars in the sky.
There is noodle soup in the bowl.
Mother washed the bowl clean.
I drank one bowl of tea.
There is one person by the door.
He is a good person.
There are many people at the market.
It is snowing heavily in the mountains today.
It snowed heavily at night.
If it snows heavily, I will not go outside.
This place is peaceful.
We saw a new place.
What place do you live in?
He ran and started sweating.
When the sun is hot, I sweat.
She sweated after doing a lot of work.
Maybe it will rain tomorrow.
Maybe he is at home.
Maybe we can meet this evening.
You need to bring an umbrella.
I am carrying two books.
Father carried a big bag.
When it rains, an umbrella is needed.
My umbrella is red.
She bought a new umbrella.
I was late to class today.
He was not late to work.
Because it rained, we were late.
Today I got time to read.
She did not get time to drink tea.
On the weekend we will get time for a walk.
Last week I went to Lhasa.
Last week he bought a new book.
Last week the weather was cold.
That dance is very nice to watch.
Today the horse race is exciting to watch.
His movie is very enjoyable to watch.
Which season do you like?
Spring is a good season.
In this season, it rains a lot.
In the south, the weather is warm.
We will go south.
His house is in the south of the city.
The sun is going down in the west.
That market is west of the village.
I came from the west.
In the morning the sun rises in the east.
That school is east of the village.
He went toward the east.
A lot of snow falls in the north.
My friend comes from the north.
The lake is north of the house.
At night I fall asleep early.
At night there is strong wind outside.
She is reading a book at night.
There are white clouds in the sky.
If there are many clouds, it will rain.
Clouds are around the mountain top.
There is a strong wind today.
The wind made the leaves fall to the ground.
He closed the door in the wind.
The tree's leaves are green.
In autumn, the leaves become yellow.
The child picked up one leaf.
It is thundering outside.
It thundered at night, so I could not sleep.
Before the rain fell, it thundered.
There was an earthquake in the morning.
When the earthquake happened, people went outside.
There was no earthquake today.
The weather is bad today.
His food is not bad.
The road was bad, so we went slowly.
It hailed in the evening.
If it hails, it hurts the flowers.
It is hailing in the mountain area.
A lot of rain fell and there was a flood.
During the flood, the road was blocked.
That village has a flood risk.
There was a big storm at night.
Because there was a storm, we stayed home.
After the storm, the sky became clear.
I heard loud thunder.
The child was afraid of the thunder.
There is thunder during the rain.
A soft rain is falling in the morning.
I went for a walk in the soft rain.
The soft rain made the place feel gentle and warm.
It is warm inside the house.
Drink some warm tea.
After the sun rose, the place became warm.
The weather changes quickly.
His plan did not change.
If the temperature changes, bring clothes.
There is a lot of fog in the morning.
In the fog, it is hard to see the road.
After the sun rose, the fog disappeared.
The air in the mountains is clean.
The room needs fresh air.
The smell of incense made the air pleasant.
What is the temperature today?
The temperature is low in the mountains.
If the temperature is high, drink a lot of water.
If it rains, I stay at home.
If you are tired, rest.
If there is time, we will meet.
This flower is red.
Mother put flowers by the window.
In spring, the flowers smell nice.
That road is dangerous.
During an earthquake, old houses are dangerous.
Going outside in a storm is dangerous.
I know his name.
Do you know Tibetan?
She does not know that road.
I will go tomorrow.
If I have time, I will go.
Even if you do not go, I will go.
It will snow in the mountains tomorrow.
It will snow this evening.
The weather is cold. It will snow.
I am hungry.
The child cried because he was hungry.
When she is hungry, she eats noodle soup.
If you catch a cold, you need to take medicine.
Mother bought medicine from the clinic.
He needs that medicine.
Large hail fell to the ground.
After the hail, the road became white.
He saw the hail and closed the door.
Please open that door.
Because there was wind, I closed the door.
She is standing by the door.
In the morning the road got foggy.
If it gets foggy, drive slowly.
It is getting foggy on the mountain top.
The temperature is balanced today.
Inside the house, the temperature is comfortable.
I like spring because the temperature is balanced.
It rained softly last evening.
It rained softly and the place became clean.
Even if it rains softly in the morning, I will go.
The school environment is clean.
We care about the environment.
The surroundings in the mountain area are peaceful.
He caught a cold.
If it is cold, it is easy to catch a cold.
If you catch a cold, rest.
The thunder at night is scary.
That old road is scary.
That movie is not scary.
I saw many places in Tibet.
The rain made many places wet.
He has gone to many places.
Wherever you go, bring an umbrella.
Wherever you go, I will remember you.
Wherever you go, drink plenty of water.
Next time we will meet again.
After eating, I went for a walk.
Next time, please come early.
I am reading a new novel.
Her novel is interesting.
There are many novels in the bookstore.
In summer, I like swimming.
She swims in the morning.
After swimming, he got tired.
She is dancing in the evening.
We danced at the celebration.
That girl likes to dance.
He has a new musical instrument.
That instrument sounds pleasant.
There are many musical instruments at school.
She is singing.
We sang together.
The children like to sing.
He likes football.
After school, we play football.
The football match is exciting to watch.
There is one match today.
After the match, he was tired.
I will watch that match.
I will watch a movie this evening.
That movie is interesting.
He made a new movie.
There is a horse race in that village.
Many people are watching the horse race.
My father likes horse racing.
That dance is very nice to watch.
She is learning dance.
At the celebration there is dancing and song.
I am looking at the sky.
She watched a movie.
Please look by the door.
This evening we will go for a stroll.
When the weather is warm, I like to stroll.
They went for a stroll by the water.
He is playing music this evening.
My friend knows how to play an instrument.
She played music at school.
I am listening to music.
Listen to the teacher's voice.
She listened to a pleasant song.
Tibetans drink a lot of tea.
At the celebration, Tibetans sing.
Tibetans speak Tibetan.
He is Indian.
My female friend is Indian.
That Indian person knows a little Tibetan.
She is Korean.
Two Korean people are at the market.
I met a Korean person.
There is a European person in my class.
He is European.
The European people visited the museum.
I was late for the match.
He was not late for the lesson.
The road was blocked, so we were late.
He is eating meat.
I eat a little meat.
There is meat and vegetables in the food.
On the weekend, I will relax at home.
After work, he is relaxing.
Today we need to take it easy.
He does not smoke.
Please do not smoke inside the house.
If someone smokes, the air becomes bad.
Every day I study.
He exercises every day.
Every day Mother makes tea.
I feel happy today.
After meeting his friend, he became happy.
Listening to that song, she is happy.
I like music.
She is listening to pleasant music.
With music, dancing is easy.
Please help me.
Father helped him.
We need help today.
He likes basketball.
We play basketball in the evening.
That basketball match is fast.
I exercise in the morning.
He exercises every day.
After exercising, drink water.
The child fell asleep quickly.
At night I am not falling asleep.
Listening to music, she fell asleep.
Please do not get angry.
He was late, so the teacher got angry.
The child lost the book, so Mother got angry.
There is one night club in the city.
They danced at the night club.
There is loud music inside the night club.
The teacher teaches Tibetan.
He is teaching class in the morning.
She teaches musical instruments to the children.
He is running in the morning.
The children ran on the field.
After running, I sweated.
We won the match.
He won at football.
After winning, she was happy.
There is a good show today.
They went to watch a show.
After the show, we returned home.
I study Tibetan.
Can you speak Tibetan?
The teacher teaches Tibetan.
He is playing football in the evening.
We played football on the field.
If it rains, we cannot play football.
We went to the museum.
Inside the museum there are many old objects.
Tomorrow the students will go to the museum.
I am drinking fruit juice.
She bought fruit juice at the market.
This fruit juice is tasty.
He is from China.
I saw many cities in China.
There are many people in China.
I study Tibetan every day.
She is studying in the library.
If I have time, I will study science.
I am washing my hands.
Mother washed clothes.
Wash your hands before eating.
The children are playing outside.
We played on the weekend.
After school, he likes to play.
There are many animals in the mountains.
The children like animals.
Animals need water and food.
That song sounds nice.
His story is interesting to hear.
I heard the pleasant sound of an instrument.
This exercise is easy.
This Tibetan is not easy.
If you help, it is easy.
I like science.
The teacher teaches science.
That science book is interesting.
I have free time today.
If I have free time, I watch a movie.
She has a little free time.
After the sun came out, the snow melted.
The butter is melting in the hot water.
If the snow melts, the road becomes wet.
This work is simple.
Make a simple plan.
This sentence is simple, so I understand it.
There are coins in my bag.
You need small money at the market.
He gave three coins.
I bought a gift for my female friend.
That gift is small.
Mother gave him a gift.
This peach is tasty.
She bought peaches at the market.
I ate one peach.
Bananas are yellow.
The children like bananas.
Father bought three bananas.
Mother lit incense in the morning.
The incense smells pleasant.
There is incense inside the house.
The price of peaches went down.
At the market, the price of bananas is going down.
If the price goes down, I will buy the gift.
The price of fruit juice went up.
At the market, the price of meat is going up.
If the price goes up, we buy less.
Please open the door.
In the morning, Father opened the shop door.
If you need fresh air, open the door.
Because there is strong wind, close the door.
She closed the door at night.
The shop closes in the evening.
Please taste this food.
I tasted the fruit juice.
She tasted the peach and bought it.
Leaves fell from the tree.
The bowl did not fall to the ground.
Water is dripping near the door.
Please put that book on the table.
Mother put the flowers by the window.
I put the ticket in the bag.
The tea ran out.
The shop is out of bananas.
When time runs out, we go.
This fruit is sour.
That peach is not sour.
He drank a sour juice.
There is one donkey on the village road.
The donkey carries a big bag.
The child gave water to the donkey.
The shopkeeper gave me an invoice.
Put that invoice in the bag.
She is looking at the invoice.
I bought a movie ticket.
Do not lose that ticket.
She has a ticket for the match.
We have a plan for tomorrow.
His plan is simple.
If it rains, the plan will change.
There is a big obstacle on the road.
The rain is an obstacle to our plan.
Even though there is an obstacle, we keep going.
